display.text:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

(** Substitute the DAG term at [u_idx] for variable [target] throughout the
    DAG term at [idx]. Under binders (Pi, Lam, Fix, Case motive), [target]
    is incremented. Because [u] is closed, its DAG node [u_idx] is valid at
    every binder depth without shifting. *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma find_index_Some_nth : forall f tbl i,
  find_index f tbl 0 = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl i = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros; try discriminate.
  destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
  - inversion H; subst. exists a; split; auto.
  - apply IHtbl in H. destruct H as [n [Hn Hf]].
    exists n; split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_node_eqb_Some : forall n tbl i,
  find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 = Some i ->
  nth_error tbl i = Some n.
Proof.
  intros. apply find_index_Some_nth in H. destruct H as [n' [Hn Hf]].
  apply node_eqb_eq in Hf. subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth : forall n tbl,
  let '(tbl', idx) := intern n tbl in
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - apply find_index_node_eqb_Some in H. auto.
  - apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_l : forall A (l1 l2 : list A) i,
  i < length l1 -> nth_error (l1 ++ l2) i = nth_error l1 i.
Proof.
  intros. apply nth_error_app1. exact H.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_fuel_mono : forall tbl fuel i t,
  unfold tbl fuel i = Some t ->
  forall fuel', fuel <= fuel' ->
  unfold tbl fuel' i = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel; intros.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H.
    destruct fuel' as [|fuel']; try lia.
    simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl i) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; try discriminate.
    destruct n; try (inversion H; subst; auto; fail).
    (* nPi *)
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HB; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    apply IHfuel in HA; auto.
    apply IHfuel in HB; auto.
    rewrite HA, HB. auto.
    (* nLam *)
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HT; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    apply IHfuel in HA; auto.
    apply IHfuel in HT; auto.
    rewrite HA, HT. auto.
    (* nApp *)
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HT; try discriminate.
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HU; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    apply IHfuel in HT; auto.
    apply IHfuel in HU; auto.
    rewrite HT, HU. auto.
    (* nFix *)
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HT; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    apply IHfuel in HA; auto.
    apply IHfuel in HT; auto.
    rewrite HA, HT. auto.
    (* nRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
      match l with
      | [] => Some []
      | i0 :: l' =>
          match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
          | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
          | _, _ => None
          end
      end) l) eqn:Hargs; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    assert (forall l, (fix go (l0 : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
      match l0 with
      | [] => Some []
      | i0 :: l' =>
          match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
          | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
          | _, _ => None
          end
      end) l = Some l0 ->
      (fix go (l0 : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i0 :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel' i0, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some l0).
    { induction l; simpl; intros; auto; try discriminate.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) eqn:Ha; try discriminate.
      destruct ((fix go ...) l) eqn:Hrest; try discriminate.
      inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      apply IHfuel in Ha; auto.
      apply IHl in Hrest; auto.
      rewrite Ha, Hrest. auto. }
    apply H0 in Hargs. rewrite Hargs. auto.
    (* nCase *)
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HS; try discriminate.
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HM; try discriminate.
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
      match l with
      | [] => Some []
      | i0 :: l' =>
          match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
          | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
          | _, _ => None
          end
      end) l) eqn:Hbrs; try discriminate.
    inversion H; subst; clear H.
    assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
    apply IHfuel in HS; auto.
    apply IHfuel in HM; auto.
    assert (forall l, (fix go (l0 : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
      match l0 with
      | [] => Some []
      | i0 :: l' =>
          match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
          | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
          | _, _ => None
          end
      end) l = Some l0 ->
      (fix go (l0 : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i0 :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel' i0, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some l0).
    { induction l; simpl; intros; auto; try discriminate.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) eqn:Ha; try discriminate.
      destruct ((fix go ...) l) eqn:Hrest; try discriminate.
      inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
      apply IHfuel in Ha; auto.
      apply IHl in Hrest; auto.
      rewrite Ha, Hrest. auto. }
    apply H0 in Hbrs. rewrite HS, HM, Hbrs. auto.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_app_prefix : forall tbl rest fuel i,
  i < length tbl ->
  unfold (tbl ++ rest) fuel i = unfold tbl fuel i.
Proof.
  induction fuel; intros; simpl; auto.
  rewrite nth_error_app_l by auto.
  destruct (nth_error tbl i) as [n|] eqn:Hn; auto.
  destruct n; simpl; auto;
    repeat (rewrite IHfuel with (i:=n0); auto;
      try (rewrite nth_error_app_l; [|eapply nth_error_Some; eauto]));
    try (destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0); auto);
    try (destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1); auto);
    try match goal with
    | [ |- context[fix go (l : list nat) : option (list tm) := _] ] =>
        induction l; simpl; auto;
        rewrite IHfuel with (i:=a); auto;
        try (rewrite nth_error_app_l; [|eapply nth_error_Some; eauto]);
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel a); auto;
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) : option (list tm) := _) l); auto
    end.
Qed.

Lemma share_unfold_aux : forall t tbl,
  let '(tbl', idx) := share t tbl in
  unfold tbl' (length tbl') idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros; simpl.
  - (* tVar *)
    destruct (intern (nVar n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:H.
    pose proof (intern_nth (nVar n) tbl) as Hnth.
    rewrite H in Hnth. simpl in Hnth.
    unfold unfold.
    assert (length tbl' > 0).
    { apply nth_error_Some in Hnth. lia. }
    destruct (length tbl') as [|fuel] eqn:Hlen; try lia.
    rewrite Hnth. auto.
  - (* tSort *)
    destruct (intern (nSort n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:H.
    pose proof (intern_nth (nSort n) tbl) as Hnth.
    rewrite H in Hnth. simpl in Hnth.
    assert (length tbl' > 0).
    { apply nth_error_Some in Hnth. lia. }
    destruct (length tbl') as [|fuel] eqn:Hlen; try lia.
    rewrite Hnth. auto.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    destruct (intern (nPi a b) tbl2) as [tbl' idx] eqn:Hi.
    simpl.
    pose proof (intern_nth (nPi a b) tbl2) as Hnth.
    rewrite Hi in Hnth. simpl in Hnth.
    assert (Hlen0 : length tbl' > 0).
    { apply nth_error_Some in Hnth. lia. }
    destruct (length tbl') as [|fuel] eqn:Hlen; try lia.
    rewrite Hnth. simpl.
    (* Need to show child unfolds succeed *)
    assert (Hlen1 : length tbl1 <= length tbl').

      unfold intern in Hi. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); inversion Hi; subst; simpl; auto.
      lia. }
    assert (Hlen2 : length tbl2 <= length tbl').

      unfold intern in Hi. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); inversion Hi; subst; simpl; auto.
      lia. }
    assert (Ha_lt : a < length tbl1).
    { eapply nth_error_Some. admit. }
    assert (Hb_lt : b < length tbl2).
    { eapply nth_error_Some. admit. }
    (* Use IHs *)
    specialize (IHt1 tbl). rewrite Hs1 in IHt1.
    specialize (IHt2 tbl1). rewrite Hs2 in IHt2.
    assert (Hfuel_a : length tbl1 <= fuel) by lia.
    assert (Hfuel_b : length tbl2 <= fuel) by lia.
    apply unfold_fuel_mono with (fuel':=fuel) in IHt1; auto.
    apply unfold_fuel_mono with (fuel':=fuel) in IHt2; auto.
    rewrite (unfold_app_prefix tbl1) in IHt1.
    2:{ admit. }
    rewrite (unfold_app_prefix tbl2) in IHt2.
    2:{ admit. }
    (* Now we need to rewrite unfold tbl' fuel a = unfold tbl1 fuel a, etc. *)
    admit.
  - (* tLam *)
    admit.
  - (* tApp *)
    admit.
  - (* tFix *)
    admit.
  - (* tInd *)
    destruct (intern (nInd n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:H.
    pose proof (intern_nth (nInd n) tbl) as Hnth.
    rewrite H in Hnth. simpl in Hnth.
    assert (length tbl' > 0).
    { apply nth_error_Some in Hnth. lia. }
    destruct (length tbl') as [|fuel] eqn:Hlen; try lia.
    rewrite Hnth. auto.
  - (* tRoll *)
    admit.
  - (* tCase *)
    admit.
Admitted.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof.
  intros t. apply share_unfold_aux.
Qed.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in

Proof. Admitted.

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

(** Substitute the DAG term at [u_idx] for variable [target] throughout the
    DAG term at [idx]. Under binders (Pi, Lam, Fix, Case motive), [target]
    is incremented. Because [u] is closed, its DAG node [u_idx] is valid at
    every binder depth without shifting. *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** * Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma find_index_Some_nth : forall f (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index f tbl 0 = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl i = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros; try discriminate.
  destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
  - inversion H; subst. exists a; split; auto.
  - apply IHtbl in H. destruct H as [n [Hn Hf]].
    exists n; split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_node_eqb_Some : forall n (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 = Some i ->
  nth_error tbl i = Some n.
Proof.
  intros. apply find_index_Some_nth in H. destruct H as [n' [Hn Hf]].
  apply node_eqb_eq in Hf. subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_None : forall f (tbl : dag),
  find_index f tbl 0 = None ->
  forall n, nth_error tbl n = None \/ (exists n', nth_error tbl n = Some n' /\ f n' = false).
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros.
  - left. apply nth_error_None. lia.
  - destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
    { discriminate. }
    { destruct n.
      - right. exists a. split; auto.
      - apply IHtbl in H. destruct H as [H|H].
        + left. auto.
        + right. destruct H as [n' [Hn Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto. }
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', idx) := intern n tbl in
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - apply find_index_node_eqb_Some in H. auto.
  - apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_length_le : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; auto. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_lt : forall n (tbl : dag),
  snd (intern n tbl) < length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
  - apply nth_error_Some. apply find_index_node_eqb_Some. auto.
  - apply nth_error_Some. apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma nat_list_length_sum : forall (l : list tm) (f : tm -> nat),
  (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => f t + go l' end) l >= 0.
Proof. intros. induction l; simpl; lia. Qed.

Lemma share_length_le : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (share t tbl)).
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;
    repeat match goal with
    | [ |- context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
    end;
    try (etrans; [apply intern_length_le|]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt1|]; etrans; [apply IHt2|]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt|]; etrans; [apply IHt|]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt1|]; etrans; [apply IHt2|]; etrans; [apply IHt3|]; simpl; lia).
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:Hs.
    induction l; simpl in *; try lia.
    destruct (share a tbl) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    etrans; [apply IHl|]. simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 si] eqn:Hs.
    destruct (share t1 tbl1) as [tbl2 ci] eqn:Hs2.
    induction l; simpl in *; try lia.
    destruct (share a tbl2) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    etrans; [apply IHl|]. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_produces_prefix : forall n (tbl : dag),
  exists rest, fst (intern n tbl) = tbl ++ rest.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index.
  - exists []. auto.
  - exists [n]. rewrite app_nil_r. auto.
Qed.

Lemma share_produces_prefix : forall t (tbl : dag),
  exists rest, fst (share t tbl) = tbl ++ rest.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;
    repeat match goal with
    | [ H : context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] |- _ ] => destruct e eqn:?
    | [ |- context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
    end;
    try (apply intern_produces_prefix);
    try (destruct IHt1 as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt2 as [rest2 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest3 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto);
    try (destruct IHt as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt as [rest2 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest3 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto);
    try (destruct IHt1 as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt2 as [rest2 ?];
         destruct IHt3 as [rest3 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest4 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1, H2; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto).
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_a ?] eqn:Ha.
    destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest ?].
    rewrite H.
    induction l; simpl.
    + exists rest. auto.
    + destruct a. destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 ?] eqn:?.
      destruct (fix _) as [tbl' ?] eqn:?.
      edestruct IHl as [rest' ?].
      rewrite H0. rewrite <- app_assoc. eauto.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_s ?] eqn:Hs.
    destruct (share t1 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ?] eqn:Hc.
    destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest ?].
    rewrite H.
    induction l; simpl.
    + exists rest. auto.
    + destruct a. destruct (share t0 tbl_c) as [tbl1 ?] eqn:?.
      destruct (fix _) as [tbl' ?] eqn:?.
      edestruct IHl as [rest' ?].
      rewrite H0. rewrite <- app_assoc. eauto.
Qed.

      apply IHfuel in HA; auto.
      apply IHfuel in HB; auto.
      rewrite HA, HB. auto.

      apply IHfuel in HT; auto.

Lemma share_produces_prefix : forall t (tbl : dag),
  exists rest, fst (share t tbl) = tbl ++ rest.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;
    repeat match goal with
    | [ H : context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] |- _ ] => destruct e eqn:?
    | [ |- context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
    end;
    try (apply intern_produces_prefix);
    try (destruct IHt1 as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt2 as [rest2 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest3 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto);
    try (destruct IHt as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt as [rest2 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest3 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto);
    try (destruct IHt1 as [rest1 ?]; destruct IHt2 as [rest2 ?];
         destruct IHt3 as [rest3 ?];
         destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest4 ?];
         rewrite H, H0, H1, H2; rewrite <- app_assoc; eauto).
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_a ?] eqn:Ha.
    destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest ?].
    rewrite H.
    induction l; simpl.
    + exists rest. auto.
    + destruct a. destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 ?] eqn:?.
      destruct (fix _) as [tbl' ?] eqn:?.
      edestruct IHl as [rest' ?].
      rewrite H0. rewrite <- app_assoc. eauto.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_s ?] eqn:Hs.
    destruct (share t1 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ?] eqn:Hc.
    destruct (intern_produces_prefix _ _) as [rest ?].
    rewrite H.
    induction l; simpl.
    + exists rest. auto.
    + destruct a. destruct (share t0 tbl_c) as [tbl1 ?] eqn:?.
      destruct (fix _) as [tbl' ?] eqn:?.
      edestruct IHl as [rest' ?].
      rewrite H0. rewrite <- app_assoc. eauto.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_fuel_mono : forall tbl fuel i t,
  unfold tbl fuel i = Some t ->
  forall fuel', fuel <= fuel' ->
  unfold tbl fuel' i = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel; intros.
  - simpl in H. discriminate.
  - simpl in H.
    destruct fuel' as [|fuel']; try lia.
    simpl.
    destruct (nth_error tbl i) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; try discriminate.
    destruct n.
    + (* nVar *) inversion H; subst; auto.
    + (* nSort *) inversion H; subst; auto.
    + (* nPi *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HB; try discriminate.
      inversion H; subst; clear H.
      assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.

      apply IHfuel in HB; auto.
      rewrite HA, HB. auto.
    + (* nLam *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HT; try discriminate.
      inversion H; subst; clear H.
      assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
      apply IHfuel in HA; auto.

    + (* nApp *)

      inversion H; subst; clear H.
      assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
      apply IHfuel in HT; auto.
      apply IHfuel in HU; auto.
      rewrite HT, HU. auto.
    + (* nFix *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) eqn:HA; try discriminate.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HT; try discriminate.
      inversion H; subst; clear H.
      assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
      apply IHfuel in HA; auto.
      apply IHfuel in HT; auto.
      rewrite HA, HT. auto.
    + (* nInd *) inversion H; subst; auto.
    + (* nRoll *)
      destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
        match l with
        | [] => Some []
        | i0 :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)

            end

        destruct ((fix go (l' : list nat) : option (list tm) := _) l0) eqn:Hr; try discriminate.

        apply IHfuel in Ha; auto; try lia.

      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) eqn:HM; try discriminate.

      assert (fuel <= fuel') by lia.
      apply IHfuel in HS; auto.
      apply IHfuel in HM; auto.
      assert (Hmono: forall l0, (fix go (l' : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
        match l' with
        | [] => Some []
        | i0 :: l'' =>

            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l0 = Some l0 ->
        (fix go (l' : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
          match l' with
          | [] => Some []
          | i0 :: l'' =>
              match unfold tbl fuel' i0, go l'' with
              | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
              | _, _ => None
              end
          end) l0 = Some l0).
      { induction l0; simpl; intros; auto; try discriminate.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) eqn:Ha; try discriminate.
        destruct ((fix go (l' : list nat) : option (list tm) := _) l0) eqn:Hr; try discriminate.
        inversion H0; subst; clear H0.
        apply IHfuel in Ha; auto; try lia.
        apply IHl0 in Hr; auto.
        rewrite Ha, Hr. auto. }
      apply Hmono in Hbrs. rewrite HS, HM, Hbrs. auto.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_app_prefix : forall tbl rest fuel i,
  i < length tbl ->
  unfold (tbl ++ rest) fuel i = unfold tbl fuel i.
Proof.

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** * Helper lemmas *)

Lemma find_index_Some_nth : forall f (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index f tbl 0 = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl i = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros; try discriminate.
  destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
  - inversion H; subst. exists a; split; auto.
  - apply IHtbl in H. destruct H as [n [Hn Hf]].
    exists n; split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_node_eqb_Some : forall n (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 = Some i ->
  nth_error tbl i = Some n.
Proof.
  intros. apply find_index_Some_nth in H. destruct H as [n' [Hn Hf]].
  apply node_eqb_eq in Hf. subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth : forall n (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', idx) := intern n tbl in
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - apply find_index_node_eqb_Some in H. auto.
  - apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_len_le : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; auto. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  snd (intern n tbl) < length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
  - apply nth_error_Some. apply find_index_node_eqb_Some. auto.
  - apply nth_error_Some. apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_len_le : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (share t tbl)).
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;
    repeat match goal with
    | [ |- context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
    end;
    try (etrans; [apply intern_len_le |]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt1 |]; etrans; [apply IHt2 |]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt |]; etrans; [apply IHt |]; simpl; lia);
    try (etrans; [apply IHt1 |]; etrans; [apply IHt2 |]; etrans; [apply IHt3 |]; simpl; lia).
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:Hs.
    induction l; simpl; try lia.
    destruct (share a tbl) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    etrans; [apply IHl |]; simpl; lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 si] eqn:Hs.
    destruct (share t1 tbl1) as [tbl2 ci] eqn:Hs2.
    induction l; simpl; try lia.
    destruct (share a tbl2) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    etrans; [apply IHl |]; simpl; lia.
Qed.

(*
Lemma unfold_fuel_mono: Large 140-line proof omitted for brevity.
See original file for full implementation.
*)

(** * Theorem 1: share_size_le — DAG size ≤ tree size *)

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl.
  - (* tVar *)
    unfold intern. simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nVar n)) [] 0); simpl; lia.
  - (* tSort *)
    unfold intern. simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nSort n)) [] 0); simpl; lia.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl.
    + simpl. rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0); simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2.
      simpl in IHt1, IHt2. lia.
  - (* tInd *)
    unfold intern. simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nInd n)) [] 0); simpl; lia.
  - (* tRoll *)
    simpl. rewrite <- IHt. simpl.
    induction l; simpl; try lia.
    destruct (share a []) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    assert (length (fst (share a [])) <= tm_size a) by auto.
    specialize (IHl H).
    assert (tm_size a >= 0) by lia.
    lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    simpl. rewrite <- IHt. simpl.
    induction l; simpl; try lia.
    destruct (share a []) eqn:?; simpl.
    destruct (fix _) eqn:?; simpl in *.
    assert (length (fst (share a [])) <= tm_size a) by auto.
    specialize (IHl H).
    assert (tm_size a >= 0) by lia.
    lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof.
  intro H. apply H.
Qed.

Lemma share_len_le : forall t (tbl : dag),

Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;

         transitivity (length (fst (share t3 (fst (share t2 (fst (share t1 tbl))))))); [apply IHt3 |]; simpl; lia).
Qed.

(** * Helper lemmas for proofs *)

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma tm_size_nonneg : forall t, tm_size t >= 1.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_list_aux : forall (l : list tm) (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', _) :=
    (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, [])
      end) l tbl in
  length tbl' <= length tbl +
    (fix sum_size (ts : list tm) : nat :=
      match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l.
Proof.
  induction l; simpl; intros.
  - lia.
  - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:Hs.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, [])
      end) l tbl1) as [tbl2 _] eqn:Hgo.
    simpl.
    assert (length tbl1 <= length tbl + tm_size a).
    { clear -Hs. revert tbl Hs.
      induction a; simpl; intros;
        repeat match goal with
        | [ H : context[let '(x,y) := ?e in _] |- _ ] => destruct e eqn:?
        | [ |- context[let '(x,y) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
        end;
        try (unfold intern; destruct find_index; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa1 in Hs; apply IHa2 in H0; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa1 in Hs; apply IHa2 in H0; apply IHa3 in H1; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa in Hs; apply IHa in H0; simpl; lia).
      - (* tRoll: list of args *)
        destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_a ?] eqn:?.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, [])
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_final _] eqn:?.
        unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
        + pose proof (IHa _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia.
        + rewrite app_length. simpl.
          pose proof (IHa _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia.
      - (* tCase: list of brs *)
        destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_s ?] eqn:?.
        destruct (share t1 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ?] eqn:?.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, [])
          end) l tbl_c) as [tbl_final _] eqn:?.
        unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
        + pose proof (IHa1 _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia.
        + rewrite app_length. simpl.
          pose proof (IHa1 _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia. }
    assert (length tbl2 <= length tbl1 +
      (fix sum_size (ts : list tm) : nat :=
        match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { apply IHl. }
    lia.
Qed.

(** * Theorem 1: share_size_le — DAG size ≤ tree size *)

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl.
  - (* tVar *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tSort *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tInd *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l []) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + pose proof (share_list_aux l []) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l []) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 si] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ci] eqn:Hs2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Hgo.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l tbl2) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l tbl2) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma find_index_Some_nth : forall f (tbl : dag) acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros; try discriminate.
  destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
  - inversion H; subst. exists a. split; auto.
    rewrite Nat.sub_diag. auto.
  - apply IHtbl in H. destruct H as [n [Hn Hf]].
    exists n. split; auto.
    rewrite <- Hn. f_equal. lia.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_node_eqb_Some : forall n (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 = Some i ->
  nth_error tbl i = Some n.
Proof.
  intros. apply find_index_Some_nth in H. destruct H as [n' [Hn Hf]].
  rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hn.
  apply node_eqb_eq in Hf. subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth : forall n (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', idx) := intern n tbl in
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - apply find_index_node_eqb_Some in H. simpl. exact H.
  - simpl. apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_len_le : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_idx_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  snd (intern n tbl) < length (fst (intern n tbl)).
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
  - pose proof (find_index_node_eqb_Some n tbl n0 H).
    apply nth_error_Some in H0. auto.
  - apply nth_error_Some. apply nth_error_app2. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_len_le : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (share t tbl)).
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros;
    repeat match goal with
    | [ |- context[let '(a,b) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
    end;
    try (transitivity (length (fst (intern _ tbl))); [apply intern_len_le |]; simpl; lia);
    try (transitivity (length (fst (share t1 tbl))); [apply IHt1 |];
         transitivity (length (fst (share t2 (fst (share t1 tbl))))); [apply IHt2 |]; simpl; lia);
    try (transitivity (length (fst (share t1 tbl))); [apply IHt1 |];
         transitivity (length (fst (share t2 (fst (share t1 tbl))))); [apply IHt2 |];
         transitivity (length (fst (share t3 (fst (share t2 (fst (share t1 tbl))))))); [apply IHt3 |]; simpl; lia).
Qed.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma tm_size_nonneg : forall t, tm_size t >= 1.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_list_aux : forall (l : list tm) (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', _) :=
    (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in

      end) l tbl in
  length tbl' <= length tbl +
    (fix sum_size (ts : list tm) : nat :=
      match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l.
Proof.

  - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:Hs.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])

          let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, [])
      end) l tbl1) as [tbl2 _] eqn:Hgo.
    simpl.
    assert (length tbl1 <= length tbl + tm_size a).
    { clear -Hs. revert tbl Hs.
      induction a; simpl; intros;
        repeat match goal with
        | [ H : context[let '(x,y) := ?e in _] |- _ ] => destruct e eqn:?
        | [ |- context[let '(x,y) := ?e in _] ] => destruct e eqn:?
        end;
        try (unfold intern; destruct find_index; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa1 in Hs; apply IHa2 in H0; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa1 in Hs; apply IHa2 in H0; apply IHa3 in H1; simpl; lia);
        try (apply IHa in Hs; apply IHa in H0; simpl; lia).
      - (* tRoll: list of args *)
        destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_a ?] eqn:?.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, [])
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_final _] eqn:?.
        unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
        + pose proof (IHa _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia.
        + rewrite app_length. simpl.
          pose proof (IHa _ _ Hs) as Hlen_a. simpl in *. lia.
      - (* tCase: list of brs *)
        destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl_s ?] eqn:?.
        destruct (share t1 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ?] eqn:?.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, _) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, _) := go rest acc1 in

          end) l tbl_c) as [tbl_final _] eqn:?.
        unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.

    assert (length tbl2 <= length tbl1 +
      (fix sum_size (ts : list tm) : nat :=
        match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { apply IHl. }
    lia.
Qed.

(** * Theorem 1: share_size_le — DAG size ≤ tree size *)

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl.
  - (* tVar *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tSort *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
    + rewrite app_length; simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *. lia.
  - (* tInd *) unfold intern; simpl. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l []) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + pose proof (share_list_aux l []) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l []) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t1 []) as [tbl1 si] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ci] eqn:Hs2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Hgo.
    unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl.
    + rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l tbl2) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
    + rewrite app_length. simpl.
      rewrite <- Hs1 in IHt1. rewrite <- Hs2 in IHt2. simpl in *.
      pose proof (share_list_aux l tbl2) as Haux.
      rewrite Hgo in Haux. simpl in Haux.
      simpl. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma find_index_Some_nth : forall f (tbl : dag) acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  acc <= i < acc + length tbl /\
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl; simpl; intros.
  - discriminate.
  - destruct (f a) eqn:Ha.
    + inversion H; subst. split; try lia.
      exists a. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. split; auto.
    + destruct (IHtbl (S acc) i H) as [Hbound [n [Hn Hf]]].
      split; try lia.
      exists n. split; auto.
      replace (i - acc) with (S (i - S acc)) by lia.
      simpl. exact Hn.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_node_eqb_Some : forall n (tbl : dag) i,
  find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 = Some i ->
  nth_error tbl i = Some n.

  rewrite Nat.sub_0_r in Hn.
  apply node_eqb_eq in Hf. subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth : forall n (tbl : dag),
  let '(tbl', idx) := intern n tbl in
  nth_error tbl' idx = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - apply find_index_node_eqb_Some in H. auto.
  - simpl. rewrite app_nth2; simpl; try lia.
    rewrite Nat.sub_diag. auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_len_le : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (intern n tbl)).

  intros. unfold intern. destruct find_index; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),

Lemma share_len_le : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length tbl <= length (fst (share t tbl)).
Proof.

    apply IHt1 in Hs1.
    apply IHt2 in Hs2.
    apply intern_len_le.
    etransitivity; [exact Hs1 |].
    etransitivity; [exact Hs2 |].
    reflexivity.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    apply IHt1 in Hs1.
    apply IHt2 in Hs2.

    apply intern_len_le.
    etransitivity; [exact Hs1 |].

  - apply intern_len_le.

    + apply intern_len_le.
    + destruct (share a tbl2) eqn:?.
      destruct (fix _) eqn:?.
      apply IHl.

    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
