From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

I need to replace this with a working proof. The key insight: `intern` adds at most 1 node (either finds existing or appends one). `share t []` makes at most `tm_size t` calls to intern.

Write a proof using `induction t` and for each case, handle the intern calls. Use `lia` for arithmetic.

The file has `Require Import Lia` already imported.

Use the `rocq-piler_edit_file` tool to make the edit, then `rocq-piler_check_file` to verify. Only modify the `share_size_le` theorem (and the `_neg` version should stay Admitted).

Here's my suggested approach:
1. Use induction on t
2. For each case, destruct the share calls and intern calls
3. Use simpl and lia to close each goal

Write the proof and verify it compiles. Return the final result to me.

cat > /tmp/test_share.v << 'ENDCOQ'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  fix IH 1.
  intros t tbl.
  destruct t; simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        simpl.
        pose proof (IH a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
        { eapply IHl; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    simpl.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll _ _ idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t2 tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share t3 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl) as H_s.
    rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (IH t3 tbl_s) as H_c.
    rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        simpl.
        pose proof (IH a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
        { eapply IHl; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    simpl.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase _ si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. apply share_length_bound with (tbl := []). simpl. lia.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_share2.v << 'ENDCOQ'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  fix IH 1.
  intros t tbl.
  refine (
    match t with
    | tVar _ => _
    | tSort _ => _
    | tPi A B => _
    | tLam A t0 => _
    | tApp t0 u => _
    | tFix A t0 => _
    | tInd _ => _
    | tRoll I c args => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => _
    end
  ); simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share B tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH A tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH B tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH A tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t0 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share u tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH t0 tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH u tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    simpl.
    pose proof (IH A tbl) as H1.
    rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IH t0 tbl1) as H2.
    rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) args tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction args; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) args tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        simpl.
        pose proof (IH a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
        { eapply IHargs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    simpl.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll I c idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share scrut tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share C tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (IH scrut tbl) as H_s.
    rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (IH C tbl_s) as H_c.
    rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) brs tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction brs; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) brs tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        simpl.
        pose proof (IH a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
        { eapply IHbrs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    simpl.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase I si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []) as H.
  simpl in H. exact H.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_share3.v << 'ENDCOQ'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  fix IH 1.
  destruct t; intros; simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll - note: destruct t gives args as l *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (IH a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
        { eapply IHl; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll _ _ idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t2 tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share t3 tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl) as H_s. rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (IH t3 tbl_s) as H_c. rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) l tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) l tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (IH a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) l).
        { eapply IHl; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase _ si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []) as H.
  simpl in H. exact H.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

state.title: Test share_length_bound with fix IH approach

input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_share4.v << 'ENDCOQ'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Fixpoint share_length_bound (t : tm) (tbl : dag) : length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  refine (
    match t with
    | tVar _ => _
    | tSort _ => _
    | tPi A B => _
    | tLam A t0 => _
    | tApp t0 u => _
    | tFix A t0 => _
    | tInd _ => _
    | tRoll I c args => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => _
    end
  ); simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share B tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound B tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share u tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound u tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) args tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction args; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) args tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
        { eapply IHargs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll I c idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share scrut tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share C tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (share_length_bound scrut tbl) as H_s. rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (share_length_bound C tbl_s) as H_c. rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) brs tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction brs; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) brs tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
        { eapply IHbrs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase I si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf; simpl; try (rewrite app_length; simpl); lia.
Defined.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []) as H.
  simpl in H. exact H.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl

      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2

  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=

              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Fixpoint share_length_bound (t : tm) (tbl : dag) : length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  refine (
    match t with
    | tVar _ => _
    | tSort _ => _
    | tPi A B => _
    | tLam A t0 => _
    | tApp t0 u => _
    | tFix A t0 => _
    | tInd _ => _
    | tRoll I c args => _
    | tCase I scrut C brs => _
    end
  ); simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share B tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound B tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share u tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound u tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) args tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction args; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts0 with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) args tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
        { eapply IHargs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll I c idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share scrut tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share C tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (share_length_bound scrut tbl) as H_s. rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (share_length_bound C tbl_s) as H_c. rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) brs tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction brs; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts0 with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) brs tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
        { eapply IHbrs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase I si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Defined.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []) as H.
  simpl in H. exact H.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Fixpoint share_length_bound (t : tm) (tbl : dag) : length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  refine (match t with
  | tVar _ => _
  | tSort _ => _
  | tPi A B => _
  | tLam A t0 => _
  | tApp t0 u => _
  | tFix A t0 => _
  | tInd _ => _
  | tRoll I c args => _
  | tCase I scrut C brs => _
  end).
  - simpl. apply intern_len_bound.
  - simpl. apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *) simpl.
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share B tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound B tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tLam *) simpl.
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tApp *) simpl.
    destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share u tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound u tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tFix *) simpl.
    destruct (share A tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t0 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (share_length_bound A tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t0 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2.
    simpl in H1, H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tInd *) simpl. apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tRoll *) simpl.
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) args tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hlist : length tbl1 <= length tbl +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
    { revert tbl Hgo. induction args; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts0 with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) args tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) args).
        { eapply IHargs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll I c idxs)) tbl1 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tCase *) simpl.
    destruct (share scrut tbl) as [tbl_s si] eqn:Hss.
    destruct (share C tbl_s) as [tbl_c ci] eqn:Hsc.
    pose proof (share_length_bound scrut tbl) as H_s. rewrite Hss in H_s. simpl in H_s.
    pose proof (share_length_bound C tbl_s) as H_c. rewrite Hsc in H_c. simpl in H_c.
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end) brs tbl_c) as [tbl_brs bis] eqn:Hgo.
    assert (Hbrs : length tbl_brs <= length tbl_c +
      (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
        match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
    { revert tbl_c Hgo. induction brs; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Hgo; subst. lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl_c) as [tbl_a idx_a] eqn:Hs_a.
        destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) : dag * list nat :=
          match ts0 with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx0) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
          end) brs tbl_a) as [tbl_rest rest_idxs] eqn:Hgr.
        inversion Hgo; subst; clear Hgo.
        pose proof (share_length_bound a tbl_c) as Hlen_a.
        rewrite Hs_a in Hlen_a. simpl in Hlen_a.
        assert (Hlen_rest : length tbl_rest <= length tbl_a +
          (fix sum_size (l1 : list tm) : nat :=
            match l1 with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_size rest end) brs).
        { eapply IHbrs; eauto. }
        simpl in *. lia. }
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase I si ci bis)) tbl_brs 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Defined.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []) as H.
  simpl in H. exact H.
Qed.
ENDCOQ

input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_share7.v << 'ENDCOQ'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Lemma intern_len_bound : forall n (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= length tbl + 1.
Proof.
  intros. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) as [i|] eqn:H.
  - simpl. lia.
  - simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t (tbl : dag),
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= length tbl + tm_size t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros; simpl.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - apply intern_len_bound.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 fi] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ai] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp fi ai)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:Hs1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:Hs2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as H1. rewrite Hs1 in H1. simpl in H1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as H2. rewrite Hs2 in H2. simpl in H2.
    unfold intern.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [i|] eqn:Hf.
    + simpl. lia.
    + simpl. rewrite app_length. simpl. lia.
  - (* tInd *) apply intern_len_bound.
Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. Admitted.
ENDCOQ
